parameters.query:
INSERT INTO grants (
  source_id, title, description, funder, max_award,
  currency, deadline, geographic_focus, is_active, url, source
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.source_id }},
  {{ $json.title }},
  {{ $json.description }},
  {{ $json.funder }},
  {{ $json.max_award }},
  {{ $json.currency }},
  {{ $json.deadline }},
  {{ $json.geographic_focus }},
  {{ $json.is_active }},
  {{ $json.url }},
  {{ $json.source }}
)
ON CONFLICT (source_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title           = EXCLUDED.title,
  description     = EXCLUDED.description,
  funder          = EXCLUDED.funder,
  max_award       = EXCLUDED.max_award,
  deadline        = EXCLUDED.deadline,
  is_active       = EXCLUDED.is_active,
  url             = EXCLUDED.url,
  updated_at      = NOW()
RETURNING id, (xmax = 0) AS inserted;

UPDATE grants
SET is_active = false, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE deadline IS NOT NULL
  AND deadline < NOW()
  AND is_active = true
RETURNING id;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grants WHERE source = '360giving' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND created_at = updated_at) AS added,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grants WHERE source = '360giving' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND created_at != updated_at) AS updated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grants WHERE is_active = false AND DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE) AS expired,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grants WHERE is_active = true) AS total_active;
